assignment_description:
Cardboard Work Model 1 Pair of Steps
⍞ Materials: Sloyd by Schwartz, chipboard, ruler, pencil, scissors, tape, awl, bone (optional), X-Acto knife

➜ VIEW
Photo of model and tutorial. Visualize steps to work the model.
∞ Image & Video Link: Pair of Steps

➜ PRACTICE
Work on the model. Read and demonstrate instructions one step at a time.
Cardboard Work: 3-D Geometric Shapes "No.10: Pair of Steps" p.53-54
Find a creative way to use your finished model. Create another one out of different materials, scaling your work either up or down by changing the measurements.
